channel.title: Pokemon GO News & Events
channel.description: Official Pokemon GO + GO Hub + LeekDuck

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Road of Legends Day 5: All Five-Star Raids, Primal Raids , Bonuses and Guides
item.description:
Road of Legends is a stacked week of Legendary raids, Mega Raids, event bonuses, Special Backgrounds, Adventure Effects, and a new GO Pass. Running from July 6, 2026, at 12:01 a.m. to July 10, 2026, at 11:59 p.m. local time, Road of Legends is a final prep event before GO Fest Global weekend. Trainers will […]

The post Road of Legends Day 5: All Five-Star Raids, Primal Raids , Bonuses and Guides appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Pokémon GO Fest Global 2026: Saturday Raids
item.description:
Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global takes place from July 11-12, from 10:00 am local time, to 7:00 pm local time on each day. Mega Mewtwo X and Y will make their Pokémon GO debut, along with Zeraora! To celebrate 10 years of Pokémon GO, this years Global GO Fest event is FREE for all Trainers! […]

The post Pokémon GO Fest Global 2026: Saturday Raids appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Pokémon GO Fest Global 2026: Sunday Raids
item.description:
Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global takes place from July 11-12, from 10:00 am local time, to 7:00 pm local time on each day. Mega Mewtwo X and Y will make their Pokémon GO debut, along with Zeraora! To celebrate 10 years of Pokémon GO, this years Global GO Fest event is FREE for all Trainers! […]

The post Pokémon GO Fest Global 2026: Sunday Raids appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global Wild Spawns
item.description:
Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global features a large variety of wild Pokémon across six rotating habitats, with each habitat spotlighting three different Pokémon types. While Pokémon from all three types will appear throughout each three-hour block, one type will be featured more frequently during each hour. This guide breaks down every confirmed wild spawn by […]

The post Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global Wild Spawns appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global
item.description:
Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global takes place from July 11-12, from 10:00 am local time, to 7:00 pm local time on each day. Mega Mewtwo X and Y will make their Pokémon GO debut, along with Zeraora! To celebrate 10 years of Pokémon GO, this years Global GO Fest event is FREE for all Trainers! […]

The post Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] This week in Pokémon GO: July 13 – July 19, 2026
item.description:
Pokémon GO’s July 13 -19 week has us well into the season of Forever Forward! GO Fest may be over for another year, but don’t think the hype ends yet! A special anniversary Pikachu celebration takes place, and Mega Raichu X and Y debut. Plus the weekly rotating Raid Hours, Spotlight Hour, Dynamax Battles and […]

The post This week in Pokémon GO: July 13 – July 19, 2026 appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Pokémon GO Summer Quest
item.description:
To celebrate 10 years of Pokémon GO, the area around The Green at Boxpark in Shoreditch, London will be turned into a real-world Pokémon GO playground with the Pokémon GO Summer Quest event. The Green at Boxpark in Shoreditch, London, UK August 1–2 August 8–9 Free Timed Research will be available to Trainers exploring the […]

The post Pokémon GO Summer Quest appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Special Anniversary Pikachu Celebration Event
item.description:
Costume Pikachu have made their return to Pokémon GO debut during the Special Anniversary Pikachu Celebration event! The Pokémon GO Special Anniversary Pikachu Celebration event runs from Monday, July 13, at 10:00 a.m. to Monday, July 20, 2026, at 8:00 p.m. local time. The event sees the return of Rock Star Pikachu, Pop Star Pikachu, […]

The post Special Anniversary Pikachu Celebration Event appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Ultra Unlock: 10th Anniversary Edition
item.description:
First Partner Pokémon with special backgrounds feature during the Ultra Unlock: 10th Anniversary event! The Pokémon GO Ultra Unlock: 10th Anniversary event runs from Tuesday, July 21, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. to Monday, July 27, 2026 at 8:00 p.m. local time. The event also sees a variety of rotating daily bonuses! This guide covers everything […]

The post Ultra Unlock: 10th Anniversary Edition appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Pokémon GO Water Festival 2026 Guide – Arrokuda, Cramorant, Bonuses and GO Pass
item.description:
Arrokuda and Cramorant make their Pokémon GO debuts during the Ultra Unlock: Water Festival 2026 event! Running from Tuesday, August 18, at 10:00 a.m. to Monday, August 24, 2026, at 8:00 p.m. local time, the event features a new GO Pass, boosted Shiny rates for select Pokémon, escalating catch bonuses, and more. Water Festival also […]

The post Pokémon GO Water Festival 2026 Guide – Arrokuda, Cramorant, Bonuses and GO Pass appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] National Trust x Pokémon GO Events
item.description:
Pokémon GO has teamed up with the National Trust in the UK to make your Pokémon adventures more interesting than ever! From historic houses and castles to gardens, parklands, and coastal landscapes, the National Trust offers countless opportunities for adventure. Trainers will be able to enjoy special Pokémon GO activities at participating National Trust locations […]

The post National Trust x Pokémon GO Events appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Raid Make-Up Event
item.description:
During Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global certain areas experienced issues with raids. This led to Scopely Explore turning off Team GO Rocket to help the event run smoother. Trainers experienced technical issues when attempting to join raid battles that led to them being unable to participate in raids. As a result, a special make-up raid […]

The post Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Raid Make-Up Event appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.
